title: Loctite Super Glue Brush On 5g
features: Fast Applicator Brush – The strong, clear adhesive comes equipped with a specialised applicator brush that ensures full coverage. Use on clean and dry surfaces.
Fast-Drying – The cyanoacrylate glue is extremely fast-drying and strong, and can be dry in 3 seconds. It will dry clear. Suitable for wood, porcelain, metal and more.
Easy to Use – The all-purpose plastic glue and applicator are easy to use. The bottle is spill-proof and the cap is easy-open, ensuring no spillages or accidents.
Triple Resistance – The new waterproof adhesive formula is water and dishwasher resistant. It is also resistant to impact and temperature extremes (-50°C to 120°C).
Package Contents – Loctite Super Glue Brush On, universal liquid glue with new ethyl cyanoacrylate formula, works as wood glue, metal glue and more, clear, 1x5g Can
